content:
🔥 buzz | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: Offline audio and video transcription and translation on a personal computer.
✨ Key Features: • Transcribe audio and video files or Youtube links • Live realtime audio transcription from microphone • Speech separation before transcription • Speaker identification • Multiple whisper backend support (CUDA, Apple Silicon, Vulkan)
📖 Summary: Buzz is a desktop application that transcribes and translates audio and video files offline on your personal computer, powered by OpenAI's Whisper. It offers advanced features like live transcription, speech separation, speaker identification, and multiple backend support for GPU acceleration.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
